title: Create:Chish
description: Put chicken and fish together？Why not!
body:
# 中文

**一个来自民乐学校的梗，经过两年开发（做白日梦），已经包含了科技、农业、战斗等元素**

## 内容

鸡鱼月饼：提供跳跃提升V和缓降

寒鸡鱼：冻住你的敌人

沼气瓶:让烈焰人燃烧室进入超级燃烧状态

内置的机械动力配方

# English

**A meme from Minle School, after two years of development (daydreaming), already contains elements of technology,farming, combat, etc!**

## Contents

Chish Mooncake:provides jump boost V and slow falling

Frozen Chish:froze your enimemies 

Biogas Bottle: Makes the Blaze Burner start super burning

Built-in create recipies
